goal: Continue recovering additional still-useful 争鸣史 / 真名相关 local work by identifying current files that are demonstrably thinner than earlier dangling commit versions and restoring the richer versions where appropriate.
constraints: Create a fresh local safety snapshot before applying any additional recovery.
Prefer per-file recovery based on concrete evidence such as richer content or meaningful missing sections.
Do not overwrite current files if the older version is clearly just an obsolete UI variant or otherwise not an improvement.
Keep a short audit trail of the files restored in this round.
deliverables: A fresh local safety snapshot before continuing recovery.
Additional recovered story-related files restored into the working tree where useful.
An updated audit note describing this round's recovered files.
